nasb.text: They came in and took possession of it, but they did not obey Your voice or walk in Your law; they have done nothing of all that You commanded them to do; therefore You have made all this calamity come upon them.

esv.text: And they entered and took possession of it. But they did not obey your voice or walk in your law. They did nothing of all you commanded them to do. Therefore you have made all this disaster come upon them.

cnv.text: 他們進去，得到這地為業，卻不聽從你的話，也不遵行你的律法；你吩咐他們行的一切事，他們都沒有行，因此你使這一切災禍臨到他們身上。

ccb.text: 他们得到这块土地之后，却不听你的话，也不遵行你的律法，对你的吩咐置若罔闻，因此你使他们大祸临头。
